languages.text: "Вы уж простите наших. Они просто боятся..." {n}Женщина собирается уходить, но вдруг останавливается.{/n} "Вы вот что, когда будете с полковником драться, постарайтесь ему под левое подреберье попасть. Его как-то раз местная тварь прижала, ребро оттуда выдрала. Он потом ребро отобрал и им же зверюгу и заколол... Теперь там у него слабое место имеется. Вдруг вам поможет".

"You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."
languages.original_text: "Вы уж простите наших. Они просто боятся..." {n}Женщина собирается уходить, но вдруг останавливается.{/n} "Вы вот что, когда будете с полковником драться, постарайтесь ему под левое подреберье попасть. Его как-то раз местная тварь прижала, ребро оттуда выдрала. Он потом ребро отобрал и им же зверюгу и заколол... Теперь там у него слабое место имеется. Вдруг вам поможет".

When you fight the Colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now it's a weak spot. Thought it might help you."

A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."

languages.text: “请原谅我们。我们只是太害怕了……”{n}那女人作势要走，又踌躇了一下。{/n}“您跟上校交手的时候，想办法攻击他左侧肋骨的下边。他曾被本地的一头畜生逮住，被生生扯掉了一根肋骨。他抢回了那根肋骨，还拿它捅死了那畜生……不过自那时起，那里就成了他的一个弱点。这个情报对您来说或许会派上用场。”
languages.original_text: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."

traits.locale_text: ”请原谅我们。我们只是太害怕了……”{n}那女人作势要走，又踌躇了一下。{/n}“您跟上校交手的时候，想办法攻击他左侧肋骨的下边。他曾被本地的一头畜生逮住，被生生扯掉了一根肋骨。他抢回了那根肋骨，还拿它捅死了那畜生……不过自那时起，那里就成了他的一个弱点。这个情报对您来说或许会派上用场。”

languages.text: "İnsanlarımızı affetmelisiniz. Sadece korkuyorlar..." {n}Kadın gitmeye yelteniyor, sonra duraksıyor.{/n} "Dinleyin, Albay'la dövüştüğünüzde ona sol kaburgalarının altından vurmaya çalışın. Bir keresinde buralı bir yaratık onu yakalamış, bir kaburgasını tamamen söküp çıkarmıştı. O kaburgayı geri aldı ve canavarı bıçaklayarak öldürmede kullandı... Artık orada zayıf bir noktası var. Size yardımı dokunabileceğini düşündüm."
languages.original_text: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."

Sadece korkuyorlar..." {n}Kadın gitmeye yelteniyor, sonra duraksıyor.{/n} "Dinleyin, Albay'la dövüştüğünüzde ona sol kaburgalarının altından vurmaya çalışın. Bir keresinde buralı bir yaratık onu yakalamış, bir kaburgasını tamamen söküp çıkarmıştı. O kaburgayı geri aldı ve canavarı bıçaklayarak öldürmede kullandı... Artık orada zayıf bir noktası var. Size yardımı dokunabileceğini düşündüm."

languages.text: « Ne nous en voulez pas, nous sommes simplement terrifiés... » {n}La femme commence à partir, puis elle s'arrête.{/n} « Écoutez bien : quand vous affronterez le colonel, essayez de le frapper sous les côtes gauches. Une fois, une bête du coin l'a attrapé et lui a arraché une côte. Il l'a récupérée et s'en est servi pour poignarder la créature à mort... mais depuis, il a un point faible à cet endroit. Je me disais que ça pourrait vous être utile. »
languages.original_text: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."

traits.locale_text: « Ne nous en voulez pas, nous sommes simplement terrifiés... » {n}La femme commence à partir, puis elle s'arrête.{/n} « Écoutez bien : quand vous affronterez le colonel, essayez de le frapper sous les côtes gauches. Une fois, une bête du coin l'a attrapé et lui a arraché une côte. Il l'a récupérée et s'en est servi pour poignarder la créature à mort... mais depuis, il a un point faible à cet endroit. Je me disais que ça pourrait vous être utile. »

languages.text: «Tendrá que disculpar a los nuestros. Tienen miedo...». {n}La mujer se dispone a marcharse, pero duda.{/n} «Escuche: cuando se enfrente al coronel, intente golpearle bajo las costillas izquierdas. Una bestia le atrapó una vez y le arrancó una de ellas. El coronel la recuperó y la mató con ella... pero ahora tiene un punto débil. Creo que te será útil».
languages.original_text: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."

traits.locale_text: «Tendrá que disculpar a los nuestros. Tienen miedo...». {n}La mujer se dispone a marcharse, pero duda.{/n} «Escuche: cuando se enfrente al coronel, intente golpearle bajo las costillas izquierdas. Una bestia le atrapó una vez y le arrancó una de ellas. El coronel la recuperó y la mató con ella... pero ahora tiene un punto débil. Creo que te será útil».

languages.text: "Ihr müsst unseren Leuten vergeben. Sie haben einfach Angst ..." {n}Die Frau macht Anstalten, zu gehen, zögert dann aber.{/n} "Hört zu, wenn Ihr gegen den Colonel kämpft, versucht, ihn unter den linken Rippen zu treffen. Irgendein Tier hat ihm einmal eine Rippe aus dem Leib gerissen. Er hat sie sich zurückgeholt und das Biest damit erstochen ... Jetzt hat er dort allerdings einen Schwachpunkt. Ich dachte mir, das könnte helfen."
languages.original_text: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst unseren Leuten vergeben. Sie haben einfach Angst ..." {n}Die Frau macht Anstalten, zu gehen, zögert dann aber.{/n} "Hört zu, wenn Ihr gegen den Colonel kämpft, versucht, ihn unter den linken Rippen zu treffen. Irgendein Tier hat ihm einmal eine Rippe aus dem Leib gerissen. Er hat sie sich zurückgeholt und das Biest damit erstochen ... Jetzt hat er dort allerdings einen Schwachpunkt. Ich dachte mir, das könnte helfen."

languages.text: 「許してくれ、私の部下たちを。彼らはただ恐れているだけだ…」{n}女は去ろうとするが、躊躇する.{/n} 「聞け、大佐と戦った時は、左肋骨の下を狙え。ある野獣が彼を捕らえ、肋骨を一本引きちぎった。大佐はそれを取り戻し、野獣を刺し殺した。今はその辺りが弱点だ。君が勝つのに役立つかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."
